task_completion.description: Open Screaming Frog SEO Spider and enter the target URL.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screaming Frog SEO Spider application window is open with 'https://books.toscrape.com/' entered in the top URL bar.

task_completion.description: Execute the crawl and discover internal HTML pages, including paginated URLs.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screaming Frog UI showing a populated list of crawled URLs in the main window, with the progress bar indicating completion or active crawling. The list should show URLs from 'books.toscrape.com', including some with '/page-' in the path.

task_completion.description: Export the internal HTML page data to a CSV file in the specified exports directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' or 'Export' dialog box from Screaming Frog pointing to '~/Documents/SEO/exports/' (or '/home/ga/Documents/SEO/exports/'), or a file manager/terminal window showing a newly created CSV file in that exact directory.

task_completion.description: Create the pagination report text file in the specified reports directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or file manager showing the file 'pagination_report.txt' located in '~/Documents/SEO/reports/' (or '/home/ga/Documents/SEO/reports/').

task_completion.description: The report contains the total number of internal URLs and the total number of paginated URLs.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of 'pagination_report.txt' are visible, explicitly stating a total internal URL count (should be >= 50) and a paginated URL count (should be >= 10).

task_completion.description: The report contains the maximum depth of pagination observed and a recommendation on indexing.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of 'pagination_report.txt' are visible, explicitly stating a maximum pagination depth (a numeric value) and a text recommendation regarding whether the paginated pages should be indexed.

integrity.description: The agent used the Screaming Frog SEO Spider GUI to perform the crawl.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the Screaming Frog graphical interface being interacted with, rather than the agent using terminal commands like 'curl' or 'wget' to bypass the software.

integrity.description: The CSV export was generated via the Screaming Frog application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Evidence of the Screaming Frog export menu or save dialog being used, rather than a Python script or manual text file creation mimicking an export.

integrity.description: The report contains actual numbers derived from a crawl, not placeholders.
integrity.visual_evidence: The numbers in the report (total URLs, paginated URLs, max depth) should look like genuine crawl results (e.g., >50 total, >10 paginated) and not just copy-pasted prompt instructions or generic placeholders like '[Insert Total Here]'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target URL: https://books.toscrape.com/ | Pagination pattern: '/page-' | Minimum expected total URLs: 50 | Minimum expected paginated URLs: 10 | Export directory: /home/ga/Documents/SEO/exports | Report path: /home/ga/Documents/SEO/reports/pagination_report.txt
